---
title: "Developer Guide"
---

# Tenant First Aid — Developer Guide

Tenant First Aid is a chatbot that provides legal information about housing and
eviction in Oregon. This guide covers the **Flask backend**: how the LangChain
agent is wired to Vertex AI RAG and Google Gemini, how requests stream back to
the browser, and how the legal-document corpus is built and published.

For symbol-level detail — classes, functions, and their signatures — follow the
links into the [API reference](../reference/index.qmd). For the React frontend
and for deployment, see [Architecture.md](https://github.com/codeforpdx/tenantfirstaid/blob/main/Architecture.md)
and [Deployment.md](https://github.com/codeforpdx/tenantfirstaid/blob/main/Deployment.md).

## Start where you fit

The chapters are short and topic-scoped. Rather than reading front to back, pick
the path for what you are here to do.

### New here, or want the big picture

Read the [System Overview](01-system-overview.qmd) and stop. It gives you the
components, the request lifecycle, and how the pieces connect — enough to hold a
conversation about the system without touching the code.

### Backend contributor

You are changing Python — the agent, the tools, the streaming, or the API.

1. [System Overview](01-system-overview.qmd) — the shape of the system
2. [Backend Overview](02-backend-overview.qmd) — package layout, endpoints, stack
3. [RAG & Document Retrieval](03-rag-and-retrieval.qmd) — agent, tools, entry points
4. [Streaming Responses](04-streaming.qmd) — how chunks reach the browser
5. [Conversation Management](05-conversation-management.qmd) — multi-turn state

### Operations contributor

You are managing the corpus, running ingestion pipelines, or configuring the
deployment.

1. [Configuration & Logging](06-configuration.qmd) — env vars and log setup
2. [Corpus Ingestion](07-corpus-ingestion.qmd) — how documents become a datastore
3. [Command Reference](08-command-reference.qmd) — every `mise run` task, in order

## Chapters at a glance

**Architecture**

- [System Overview](01-system-overview.qmd)
- [Backend Overview](02-backend-overview.qmd)
- [RAG & Document Retrieval](03-rag-and-retrieval.qmd)
- [Streaming Responses](04-streaming.qmd)
- [Conversation Management](05-conversation-management.qmd)

**Operations**

- [Configuration & Logging](06-configuration.qmd)
- [Corpus Ingestion](07-corpus-ingestion.qmd)
- [Command Reference](08-command-reference.qmd)
